name: BackfillCoordinator

neutralConcepts: Gap detection against cursor log BEFORE EP-4 per-slice execution
Blackout window check from FREEDOM config — BackfillBlocked if active
CF-192: each slice land_raw is append-only
BackfillSliceFailed emitted per failed slice — saga aborts on failure

ironRules.rule: Gap detection MUST run before any EP-4 slice execution.
Blackout window from FREEDOM config — BackfillBlocked returned if active.
CF-192: each slice land is append-only — no updateDocument.
CF-193: validateMonotonic() per slice before cursor commit.

keywords: backfill coordinator gap detection blackout window EP-4 slice cursor monotonic CF-192 CF-193 BackfillCompleted BackfillSliceFailed BackfillBlocked
